microsoft_ft: Owned a **multi-year product roadmap** for Azure's resilience validation platform, scaling from a 2-person operation to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling workflows that reduced operational toil by 30% and converted a manual process into a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, shipping a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard.
Drove **AI-powered automation** by building an internal AI agent that restructured planning workflows, cutting cycle time by 39% and expanding drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Served as cross-functional lead across 14 high-visibility recovery executions, including a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, partnering with engineering, ops, and executive stakeholders.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI-driven adoption** for code-generation workflows, running user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Shaped the product roadmap by conducting 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps that led to the prioritization of **intent-based YAML generation** in the next release cycle.
Improved data retrieval by migrating documentation to an AI-powered **semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving developer onboarding speed.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation-prioritization framework across 140+ teams.

Defined a product strategy to eliminate launch toil, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact paths.
Built a **Power BI funnel dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps and ruthlessly prioritize high-ROI investments.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by owning the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations — keeping the user journey uninterrupted throughout the transition.
Served as Product Owner for an Agile team, facilitating sprint planning and backlog prioritization to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process.
Partnered with IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and enabling faster, lower-risk feature releases.
pro_painters: Grew **job bookings 26%** by redesigning the end-to-end customer acquisition funnel — from first-touch digital marketing through onboarding and invoicing — managing 200+ monthly proposals via a new CRM workflow.

Reduced **customer acquisition cost by 13%** and lifted conversion rates by 2.7% through a data-driven, digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to improve top-of-funnel activation.
Conducted profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks, delivering pricing model recommendations that directly improved unit economics for leadership.

tailoring_notes: 'Conversion funnel' and 'activation' language from JD woven into microsoft_2022 bullet 3 (Power BI funnel dashboard) and pro_painters bullet 1 (acquisition funnel framing).

'AI-powered / AI-driven' from JD's 'leveraging AI and ML to create personalized experiences' woven into microsoft_ft bullet 4 (AI agent) and microsoft_2023 bullet 1 (AI-driven adoption) and bullet 3 (semantic search).
'Product Owner' and 'backlog prioritization' from JD's Agile Product Owner requirement directly surfaced in amazon_robotics bullet 2.

'User onboarding / first ride / time-to-first-ride' framing from JD mirrored in pro_painters bullet 1 ('end-to-end customer acquisition funnel...through onboarding') and microsoft_ft bullet 1 ('repeatable model' for user journey).
'Ruthlessly prioritize' and 'growth targets' JD vocabulary echoed in microsoft_2022 bullet 3 ('ruthlessly prioritize high-ROI investments') and microsoft_ft bullet 1 (roadmap ownership framing).
